subject: ap-calculus-bc
title: Analysis of Functions
stimulus:
The figure above shows the graph of f(cid:132), the derivative of a twice-differentiable function f, on the closed
interval 0 (cid:133) x (cid:133) 8. The graph of f(cid:132) has horizontal tangent lines at x (cid:32) 1, x (cid:32) 3, and x (cid:32) 5. The areas of the
regions between the graph of f(cid:132) and the x-axis are labeled in the figure. The function f is defined for all real
numbers and satisfies f(cid:11)8(cid:12) (cid:32) 4.

parts.prompt:
Find all values of x on the open interval 0 (cid:31) x (cid:31) 8 for which the function f has a local minimum. Justify
your answer.
rubric_criteria: Find all values of x on the open interval 0 < x < 8
for which the function f has a local minimum.

parts.prompt: Determine the absolute minimum value of f on the closed interval 0 (cid:133) x (cid:133) 8. Justify your answer.
rubric_criteria: Determine the absolute minimum value of f on the
closed interval 0 ≤ x ≤ 8. Justify your answer.

parts.prompt:
On what open intervals contained in 0 (cid:31) x (cid:31) 8 is the graph of f both concave down and increasing?
Explain your reasoning.
rubric_criteria: On what open intervals contained in 0 < x < 8 is the graph of f both concave down and increasing?
